prompt: Using the provided reference image, turn it into a dramatic Japanese theatrical movie poster while keeping the same shrine maiden archer-swordswoman, fiery portal, bow, quiver, lightning sword, and shrine setting as the base. Push the image into a much darker, high-contrast, more detailed cinematic poster style with intense red-and-black grading, denser embers, stronger rim lighting, and a more ominous supernatural atmosphere. Add 2 demonic guardian cats in the foreground at the character’s feet: 1 white cat on the left with blue glowing eyes and an open snarling mouth, and 1 black cat on the right with red glowing eyes and an open snarling mouth, both wrapped in crackling red energy. Add shadowy monster and oni faces emerging from the dark forest edges on both sides. Increase the number of flying arrows, talismans, sparks, and glowing red energy trails around the character. Preserve the central heroic composition, but format the whole image as a full Japanese film poster with layered typography. Add the top tagline in Japanese: "禁断の力が、闇を裂く—". Add 2 vertical side taglines: left side "その巫女神より授かりし退魔の刃。" and right side "闇を祓い、すべてを護るために—". Add a small genre line above the title: "退魔×巫女×神域バトルアクション". Add the main title near the bottom center in large distressed kanji: "退魔巫女", with the subtitle beneath it: "—紅蓮の神剣—". Add a credits block in small Japanese text below the title, then add the website "taimamiko-movie.jp" and the release line at the very bottom: "2025.夏　全国ロードショー". Include a small dark rectangular logo block in the top-right corner. Make it look like a polished fantasy-horror action poster for a fictional movie.
